description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image. Set a before_script that runs ruby -v, installs bundler with --no-ri --no-rdoc, and executes bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor, and cache the vendor/ruby directory. Define a single rspec job in the default test stage that runs rspec spec. No services, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
